title: Gyro-Style Greek Meat Gyro
description: A classic Greek dish featuring thinly sliced meat, served in a warm pita with crispy vegetables and a side of tangy tzatziki sauce. This meal-prep recipe is perfect for a quick and delicious lunch or dinner.
instructions: Preheat a grill or grill pan to medium-high heat.
Form the ground lamb into a ball and flatten it slightly into a patty.
Season the lamb with salt, black pepper, and Greek seasoning.
Grill the lamb for 4-5 minutes per side, or until it reaches a safe internal temperature of 16030F.
Meanwhile, slice the red onion, bell pepper, and tomato into thin strips.
Grill the vegetables for 2-3 minutes per side, or until they are tender and lightly charred.
Warm the pita bread by wrapping it in foil and heating it in the oven for a few minutes.
Assemble the gyros by slicing the grilled lamb into thin strips and placing it in the pita bread.
Top the lamb with the grilled vegetables, crispy cucumber, tangy tzatziki sauce, and crumbled feta cheese.
